@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await∧minimal_change∧same_order(missing_id>db.findUser>not_found>audit.log>cache.set)
P: missing_id→next(err)∧db.findUser→not_found∧not_found→await(audit.log)
V: same_order
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change and same validation order(missing_id>db.findUser>not_found>audit.log>cache.set).
Plan: missing_id then next(err) and db.findUser then not_found and not_found then await(audit.log).
Verify: same validation order.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

G: refactor(createInvoice)
C: validate_input ∧ db.createInvoice ∧ audit.log ∧ queue.publish ∧ res.json
P: validate_input→db.createInvoice→audit.log→queue.publish→res.json
V: async_await ∧ minimal_change
R: !db_err→next(err) ∧ !

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(verifyWebhook)
C: raw_body∧verifySignature∧parse_json∧db.insertEvent∧next
P: raw_body→verifySignature→parse_json→db.insertEvent→next
V: async_await∧minimal_change
R: !next(err)
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(verifyWebhook).
Constraints: raw_body and verifySignature and parse_json and db.insertEvent and next.
Plan: raw_body then verifySignature then parse_json then db.insertEvent then next.
Verify: async/await and minimal_change.
Risk: high-risk next(err).
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(sendEmailReceipt)
C: async_await∧minimal_change
P: load_user→render_template→smtp.send→audit.log→next
V: await(db.findUser)∧await(audit.log)
R: !missing_id_before_db∧!not_found_before_audit
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(sendEmailReceipt).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change.
Plan: load_user then render_template then smtp.send then audit.log then next.
Verify: await(db.findUser) and await(audit.log).
Risk: high-risk missing id check before database call and high-risk not found check before audit.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcileBatch
C: load_batch∧db.fetchRows∧apply_rules∧db.save∧emit_metrics
P: async_await→minimal_change
V: await(db.fetchRows)∧await(db.save)
R: !order_change∧!extra_logic
A: keep ∧ load_batch→db.fetchRows

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcileBatch.
Constraints: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Plan: async/await then minimal_change.
Verify: await(db.fetchRows) and await(db.save).
Risk: high-risk validation order change and high-risk extra_logic.
Answer target: keep and load_batch then db.fetchRows.

Risk: high-risk next(err) and high-risk db.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
